title: EVM Contract Storage Layout
description: Language-neutral description of an EVM contract's storage layout. See ERC-draft (EVM Contract Storage Layout).

$schema.title: Schema
$schema.description: The schema this file conforms to.

$comment.title: Comment
$comment.description: An optional comment string documenting the purpose or provenance of this file.

compiler.title: Compiler information
compiler.description: Identifies the source language and compiler used to produce this storage layout. Used to select the correct slot derivation formula.

language.description: Source language. This ERC defines formulas for 'Solidity' and 'Vyper'. 'manual' MUST be used when no compiler produced any part of the layout (e.g. Huff, raw Yul, hand-written assembly).

settings.description: Compiler settings (e.g. optimizer configuration). Informative only.

storage.title: Storage entries
storage.description: Ordered list of top-level contract state variables.

types.title: Type definitions
types.description: Type definitions referenced by storage entries.

storageEntry.title: Storage entry
storageEntry.description: A single state variable or struct member.

path.description: Stable dot-separated identifier for this entry (e.g. 'vaults.lockedAmount'). If absent, consumers MUST compute it by joining label values from the top-level entry down through struct members.

offset.description: Byte offset within the storage slot where this entry begins.

slot.description: Storage slot as a decimal string. For struct members, relative to the struct's base slot. For mappings and dynamic arrays, the base slot used to derive child slots.

type.description: Type identifier referencing an entry in the file's 'types' object.

source.description: 'compiler' (default): slot/offset were emitted by the compiler named in compiler.language from verifiable source code. 'manual': the file author declared slot directly.

baseSlotDerivation.title: Base slot derivation
baseSlotDerivation.description: Names the scheme used to compute this entry's base slot, so it can be independently re-derived and verified instead of trusted as an opaque constant. MUST NOT be used for sequential, compiler-assigned slots.

namespaceId.description: Required for 'erc7201' and 'erc8042': the human-readable namespace id string the scheme hashes.

formula.description: Required for 'custom': free-text, non-machine-verified description of how 'slot' was computed.

typeDefinition.title: Type definition
typeDefinition.description: A type definition referenced by storage entries via 'type'.

encoding.description: Storage encoding. 'inplace': primitive value type stored directly at its slot. 'inplace_struct': struct type with members. 'mapping', 'dynamic_array', 'bytes': complex types requiring slot derivation per compiler.language.

label.description: Human-readable type name as it appears in the source language (e.g. 'uint256', 'mapping(address => uint256)').

numberOfBytes.description: Number of bytes this type occupies in storage, as a decimal string.

key.description: For mapping types: type identifier of the mapping key.

value.description: For mapping and dynamic_array types: type identifier of the value/element type.

base.description: For dynamic_array types: type identifier of the element type (alias of 'value', kept for compatibility with Solidity compiler output).

members.description: For inplace_struct types only: ordered list of struct member entries.

displayAnnotation.title: Display annotation
displayAnnotation.description: Optional ERC-7730 display hints for this storage entry. Consumed by wallets to present the variable's value in human-readable form during transaction simulation and clear signing.

label.description: User-facing name for the variable. For mappings, use {key[N]} to embed the Nth mapping key (outermost = {key[0]}). For arrays, use {index[N]} to embed the Nth element index.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of the variable's semantic meaning. Informative only — MUST NOT be relied upon for security decisions without additional authenticity assurances.

keyFormats.description: Array of formatters applied to mapping keys or array indices before they are embedded in label. keyFormats[0] applies to {key[0]}/{index[0]}, and so on.

params.description: Formatter parameters. Same structure as ERC-7730 field formatter params.

format.description: ERC-7730 formatter (tokenAmount, addressName, raw, date, etc.) applied to the storage value itself. Same vocabulary as display.formats[*].fields[*].format in ERC-7730.

params.description: Formatter parameters for format. Same structure as display.formats[*].fields[*].params in ERC-7730.

template.description: Natural-language description of the change. Either a plain string or an ordered array of conditional entries evaluated with JSON Logic. Supports {label}, {oldValue}, and {newValue} placeholders.

condition.description: JSON Logic expression evaluated against {oldValue, newValue, key, index}. Omit for an unconditional fallback entry.
